title: veronica orbiculata var. prenja
intro: Veronica orbiculata var. prenja is a plant species in the Veronica genus, commonly known as the orbicular Veronica. This plant is a perennial herb native to the Balkan Peninsula, and it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Veronica orbiculata var. prenja contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or dried extract for medicinal purposes.
